dataset.statement: This corpus executes production engine code but is not Sea of Thieves field evidence and cannot approve automatic or public release.

performance.scope: single-host synthetic replay; excludes native game capture and game impact

metrics.withinTwoGuidedAttemptsReason: The synthetic corpus has no human guided-retry pairs; no rate is invented.
metrics.releaseEligibilityReason: Synthetic evidence cannot satisfy the real-pilot, hardware, usability, signing, or public-release gates.
